children.text:
Really a classic! The Wrap Cross Carry is easy to handle and adjustable as well. It can be tied with one layer or multilayered. So, it can also be used for newborns as well as for toddlers with a higher weight, due to the supporting options.

+ The wrap cross underneath the pouch offers wrapping beginners additional security. The fabric can be fanned out over the shoulders to spread out the weight optimally.
- The diagonal strap can press uncomfortably onto your breastsy.

Facts
Base Size (Size 6)
Level: Easy
Usable: From birth

A Ring Sling is an all-rounder without knots which can be used right from birth for babies or for toddlers as well. A Ring Sling can be used for front-, back- or hip carrying techniques.

+ A Ring Sling can be pre-tied. It is easily usable for all babies. The fabric can be tightened easily due to the two sewn-in rings made of aluminum.
- One-shoulder carrying techniques put weight only on one shoulder and are only an additional carrying method.

Facts
Ring Sling
Level: Easy
Usable: From birth

Be flexible with your Wrap Conversion FIDELLA Fly Tai!

This baby carrier can be used for different carrying methods: for front-, hip- and back carrying. The Fly Tai can be closed, due to its long straps, with lovely finishes. The shoulder straps can be fanned out to spread out the weight of your child all over your back.

+ Fix the Mei Tai as flexible as you like - classically (for small babies) or "reinforced" (from sitting age). Due to the shoulder straps, which can be fanned out, you can spread out the weight of your child optimally.
- This baby carrier has long straps. Somebody who does not like this should take a Full-Buckle baby carrier - our Fusion. Please take care of the correct size for your baby!

Facts

Size: Baby Size, New Size and Toddler Size
Level: Easy
​Usable: From birth

A FIDELLA Fusion is a full-buckle baby carrier, totally made of wrap fabric, which is closed with buckles at hip and shoulders. It can be used as a front or back carrier. Thanks to the buckles, this carrier can be adjusted to baby wearing person and baby perfectly. The buckles can be fixed to the hip belt (from birth) or to the back panel (if your baby is can sit unassisted).

+ The carrier is easily adjustable, due to the belt straps. Full-Buckle systems are prefered from baby wearing dads.
- The carrier has to be adjusted repeatedly to the baby wearing person. Please pay attention to the correct size for your baby!

Facts
Size: Baby Size and Toddler Size
Level: Easy
Usable: From birth (Baby Size), from the 5th month (Toddler Size)

The Double Hammock can be knotted with various tying options.

These tying technique is particularly suitable for skilled and experienced users.

The Simple Rucksack is the classic of all back carrying techniques with a baby wrap. This one-layer wrapping technique is the base for various other wrapping techniques. It can be used with newborns by pre-tying the wrap.

+ You have to practice binding a baby wrap a little bit to be successful.
- You have to practice a little bit this binding technique to bring the baby onto your back. The carrying consultant who is close to you may help you with your first attempts. Everything else you can prepare while using our Carry-Me-App.

Facts
Base Size -3 (Size 3)
Level: Easy
Usable: From birth

Elegant wrapping techniques for hip carrying make the Jacquard weaving technique of your FIDELLA baby wrap appear much more intensive. You should choose one-layer binding techniques, e.g. the Hip Loop, for newborns. You can choose techniques like the Poppins Hip Carry for children who have reached sitting age.

+ This wrapping technique is a fast solution for hip carrying and a real eye-catcher.
- One-sided tying techniques are not suitable for long walks because they overstrain just one shoulder.

Facts
Base Size -2 (Size 4)
Level: Easy
Usable: From birth / sitting age
